structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Enable Condition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Enable plant in lowest stage after 15 min disabled when heating requests exceed I (default 0), OAT < lockout, and enable schedule active.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant disabled for at least 15 minutes AND (Requests > I AND OAT < HW-LOT AND schedule active)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable plant in the lowest stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Enable the plant in the lowest stage when the plant has been disabled for at least 15 minutes and:
a. Number of Heating Hot -Water Plant Requests > I (I = Ignores shall default to 0, ad justable), and
b. OAT<HW -LOT, and
c. The Boiler plant enable schedule is active.

evidence_quote:
Enable the plant in the lowest stage when the plant has been disabled for at least 15 minutes and:
a. Number of Heating Hot -Water Plant Requests > I (I = Ignores shall default to 0, ad justable), and
b. OAT<HW -LOT, and
c. The Boiler plant enable schedule is active.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Disable Condition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Disable plant after 15 min enabled when heating requests ≤ I for 3 min, or OAT > HW-LOT + 1°F, or schedule inactive.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Plant enabled for at least 15 minutes AND (Requests ≤ I for 3 minutes OR OAT > HW-LOT+1°F OR schedule inactive)
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Disable the plant.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Disable the plant when it has been enabled for at least 15 minutes and:
a. Number of Heating Hot -Water Plant Requests ≤ I for 3 minutes, or
b. OAT>HW -LOT + 1°F, or
c. The Boiler plant enable schedule is inactive.

evidence_quote:
Disable the plant when it has been enabled for at least 15 minutes and:
a. Number of Heating Hot -Water Plant Requests ≤ I for 3 minutes, or
b. OAT>HW -LOT + 1°F, or
c. The Boiler plant enable schedule is inactive.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Enable Sequence for Primary-Only Plants
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage on lead primary HW pump, then once proven on, enable lead boiler.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: First stage on lead primary HW pump per Section 5.21.6; once proven on, enable lead boiler.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
d. Stage on lead primary HW pump per Section 5.21.6 .
e. Once the lead pump has proven on, enable the lead boiler.

evidence_quote:
d. Stage on lead primary HW pump per Section 5.21.6 .
e. Once the lead pump has proven on, enable the lead boiler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Enable Sequence for Primary-Secondary Plants
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage on lead primary and secondary HW pumps, then once proven, enable lead boiler.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: First stage on lead primary and secondary HW pumps per Sections 5.21.6 and 5.21.7; once proven on, enable lead boiler.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
b. Stage on lead primary HW pump and s econdary HW pump per Sections 5.21.6 and 5.21.7 respectively.
c. Once the lead pumps have proven on, enable the lead boiler.

evidence_quote:
b. Stage on lead primary HW pump and s econdary HW pump per Sections 5.21.6 and 5.21.7 respectively.
c. Once the lead pumps have proven on, enable the lead boiler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Open Lead Boiler Isolation Valve
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: plants with headered primary HW pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Open HW isolation valve of the lead boiler when plant enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Open the HW isolation valve of the lead boiler.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Open the HW isolation valve of the lead boiler.

evidence_quote: a. Open the HW isolation valve of the lead boiler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Disable - Shut Off Boilers
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When plant disabled, shut off the enabled boiler(s).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Shut off the enabled boiler(s).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Shut off the enabled boiler(s).

evidence_quote: a. Shut off the enabled boiler(s).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Disable - Close Isolation Valves and Disable Pumps (Headered)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only and primary-secondary plants with headered primary HW pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: For each enabled boiler, close HW isolation valve after 3 minutes and disable operating HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.6.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Close HW isolation valve(s) after 3 minutes and disable operating HW pump(s).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. For each enabled boiler with headered primary HW pumps, close the HW isolation valve(s) after 3 minutes and disable the operating HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.6 .

evidence_quote: b. For each enabled boiler with headered primary HW pumps, close the HW isolation valve(s) after 3 minutes and disable the operating HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.6 .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Disable - Disable Dedicated Primary Pumps
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only and primary-secondary plants with dedicated primary HW pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: For each enabled boiler, disable the operating primary HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.6.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Disable operating primary HW pump(s).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. For each enabled boiler with dedicated primary HW pumps, disable the operating primary HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.6 .

evidence_quote: c. For each enabled boiler with dedicated primary HW pumps, disable the operating primary HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.6 .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Plant Disable - Disable Secondary Pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Disable the operating secondary HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.7.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Disable operating secondary HW pump(s).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: d. Disable the operating secondary HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.7 .

evidence_quote: d. Disable the operating secondary HW pump(s) per Section 5.21.7 .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Qrequired Calculation (Primary-Only/Primary-Secondary without Secondary Flow Meters)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only plants and primary-secondary plants without flow meters in all secondary loops
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Qrequired = 0.49 * FLOWP * (HWSTSP - HWRT) [kBtu/h], calculated as a 5-minute rolling average sampled min every 30 s.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Qrequired  is calculated based on hot water return temperature ( HWRT ), active hot water supply temperature setpoint ( HWST SP), and measured flow through the primary circuit flow meter ( FLOW P), as shown in the equation below.
Qrequired  used in logic shall be a 5 -minute rolling average of instant aneous values sampled at a minimum of every 30 seconds.
𝑄𝑟𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑖𝑟𝑒𝑑=0.49∗𝐹𝐿𝑂𝑊𝑃(𝐻𝑊𝑆𝑇𝑆𝑃−𝐻𝑊𝑅𝑇 ) [kbtu
h]

evidence_quote:
Qrequired  is calculated based on hot water return temperature ( HWRT ), active hot water supply temperature setpoint ( HWST SP), and measured flow through the primary circuit flow meter ( FLOW P), as shown in the equation below.
Qrequired  used in logic shall be a 5 -minute rolling average of instant aneous values sampled at a minimum of every 30 seconds.
𝑄𝑟𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑖𝑟𝑒𝑑=0.49∗𝐹𝐿𝑂𝑊𝑃(𝐻𝑊𝑆𝑇𝑆𝑃−𝐻𝑊𝑅𝑇 ) [kbtu
h]

structured_payload_candidate.title: Qrequired Calculation (Primary-Secondary with Secondary Flow Meters)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-secondary plants with flow meters in all secondary loops
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Qrequired = 0.49 * FLOWS * (HWSTSP - SHWRT) [kBtu/h], calculated as a 5-minute rolling average sampled min every 30 s.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Qrequired  is calculated based on secondary hot water return temperature ( SHWRT ), active hot water supply temperature setpoint (HWST SP), and measured flow through the secondary circuit flow m eter ( FLOW S), as shown in the equation below.
Qrequired  used in logic shall be a 5 -minute rolling average of instantaneous values sampled at a minimum of every 30 seconds.
𝑄𝑟𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑖𝑟𝑒𝑑=0.49∗𝐹𝐿𝑂𝑊𝑆(𝐻𝑊𝑆𝑇𝑆𝑃−𝑆𝐻𝑊𝑅𝑇 ) [kbtu
h]

evidence_quote:
Qrequired  is calculated based on secondary hot water return temperature ( SHWRT ), active hot water supply temperature setpoint (HWST SP), and measured flow through the secondary circuit flow m eter ( FLOW S), as shown in the equation below.
Qrequired  used in logic shall be a 5 -minute rolling average of instantaneous values sampled at a minimum of every 30 seconds.
𝑄𝑟𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑖𝑟𝑒𝑑=0.49∗𝐹𝐿𝑂𝑊𝑆(𝐻𝑊𝑆𝑇𝑆𝑃−𝑆𝐻𝑊𝑅𝑇 ) [kbtu
h]

structured_payload_candidate.title: B-STAGE MIN Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate B-STAGE MIN as the largest B-FiringMinX of all boilers in the stage times design capacity of all boilers in the stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Calculate B-
STAGE MIN as the largest B -FiringMinX  of all boilers in the stage times design capacity of all boilers
in the stage.

evidence_quote:
Calculate B-
STAGE MIN as the largest B -FiringMinX  of all boilers in the stage times design capacity of all boilers
in the stage.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Availability
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A stage is unavailable if a boiler or pump required for the stage is faulted; otherwise available.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Deem unavailable if a boiler required to operate is faulted per 5.1.15.5.b.1.iii or its dedicated HW pump is faulted per 5.1.15.5.b.1.i; otherwise deem available.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
A stage shall be deemed unavailable  if the
stage cannot be achieved because a boiler required to operate in the stage is faulted per Section
5.1.15.5.b.1.iii  or a hot water pump dedicated to that boil er is faulted per Section 5.1.15.5.b.1.i ;
otherwise the stage shall be deemed available.

evidence_quote:
A stage shall be deemed unavailable  if the
stage cannot be achieved because a boiler required to operate in the stage is faulted per Section
5.1.15.5.b.1.iii  or a hot water pump dedicated to that boil er is faulted per Section 5.1.15.5.b.1.i ;
otherwise the stage shall be deemed available.

structured_payload_candidate.title: General Staging Restrictions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each stage minimum runtime 10 min; timers reset at stage change; skip unavailable stages but evaluate conditionals normally.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Minimum runtime 10 minutes; b. Timers reset to zero at completion of stage change; c. Skip unavailable stages during staging events but evaluate conditionals in current stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. Each stage shall have a minimum runtime of 10 minutes.
b. Timers shall reset to zero at the completion of every stage change.
c. Any unavailable stage (see Section 5.21.3.8 ) shall be skipped during staging events, but staging
conditionals in the current stage shall be evaluated as per usual.

evidence_quote:
a. Each stage shall have a minimum runtime of 10 minutes.
b. Timers shall reset to zero at the completion of every stage change.
c. Any unavailable stage (see Section 5.21.3.8 ) shall be skipped during staging events, but staging
conditionals in the current stage shall be evaluated as per usual.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Up - Primary-Only Condensing Boiler
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if unavailable equipment, or Qrequired > 200% B-STAGE MIN of next available stage for 10 min and flow > min flow setpoint, or HWST < setpoint -10°F for 15 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
f. Stage up if any of the following is true:
1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage are
unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime
requirement. Or
2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true:
i. Qrequired  exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes
ii. Hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see
Section 5.21.8 ).
3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 1 0°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

evidence_quote:
f. Stage up if any of the following is true:
1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage are
unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime
requirement. Or
2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true:
i. Qrequired  exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes
ii. Hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see
Section 5.21.8 ).
3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 1 0°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Down - Primary-Only Condensing Boiler
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage down if (Qrequired < 110% B-STAGE MIN for 5 min or bypass valve >0% for 5 min) AND failsafe not true AND Qrequired < 80% QbX of next lower stage for 5 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage down.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
g. Stage down if all of the following are true:
1. Either:
i. Qrequired  falls below 110% of B-STAGE MIN of the current stage for 5 minutes; or
ii.  The minimum flow bypass valve, if provided, is greater than 0% open for 5 minutes.
2. The fail safe stage up condition is not true.
3. Qrequired  is less than 80% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the next available
lower stage for 5 minutes.

evidence_quote:
g. Stage down if all of the following are true:
1. Either:
i. Qrequired  falls below 110% of B-STAGE MIN of the current stage for 5 minutes; or
ii.  The minimum flow bypass valve, if provided, is greater than 0% open for 5 minutes.
2. The fail safe stage up condition is not true.
3. Qrequired  is less than 80% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the next available
lower stage for 5 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage down if (Qrequired < 110% B-STAGE MIN for 5 min or primary pumps at min speed and primary HWRT > secondary HWRT +3°F for 5 min) AND failsafe not true AND Qrequired < 80% QbX of next lower stage for 5 min.

structured_payload_candidate.title: HW Supply Temperature Reset (Trim & Respond) Parameters
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Trim & respond logic with SP0=SPmax, SPmin=90°F (condensing/hybrid) or 155°F (non-condensing), SPmax=HWSTmax, Td=10 min, T=5 min, I=2, R=Hot-Water Reset Requests, SPtrim=-2°F, SPres=+3°F, SPres-max=+7°F.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint shall be reset using Trim & Respond logic with the
following parameters:
Variable  Value
Device  Any HW Pump Distribution Loop
SP0 SPmax
SPmin 90ºF for condensing and hybrid boiler plants;
155° F for non -condensing plants
SPmax HWSTmax
Td 10 minutes
T 5 minutes
I 2
R Hot-Water  Reset  Requests
SPtrim -2ºF
SPres +3ºF
SPres-max +7ºF

evidence_quote:
Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint shall be reset using Trim & Respond logic with the
following parameters:
Variable  Value
Device  Any HW Pump Distribution Loop
SP0 SPmax
SPmin 90ºF for condensing and hybrid boiler plants;
155° F for non -condensing plants
SPmax HWSTmax
Td 10 minutes
T 5 minutes
I 2
R Hot-Water  Reset  Requests
SPtrim -2ºF
SPres +3ºF
SPres-max +7ºF

structured_payload_candidate.title: Condensing Boiler Setpoint - Only Condensing Enabled
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When only condensing boilers are enabled, condensing boiler setpoint equals plant hot water supply setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set condensing boiler setpoint to Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
When only condensing boilers are enabled, condensing boiler setpoint shall be the Plant hot water
supply temperature setpoint.

evidence_quote:
When only condensing boilers are enabled, condensing boiler setpoint shall be the Plant hot water
supply temperature setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hybrid Plant Setpoints When Non-Condensing Boilers Enabled
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Non-condensing boiler setpoint = plant HWST setpoint; SPmin in T&R loop reset to 155°F; condensing boiler setpoint = min(HWSTmax-cond, plant HWST setpoint - 10°F).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set non-condensing setpoint to plant setpoint; raise SPmin to 155°F; set condensing setpoint as defined.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. Non-condensing boiler setpoint shall be the Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint.
b. SPmin in the Plant hot water supply temperature trim and respond loop shall be reset to 155°F
while any non -condensing boilers are in operation.
c. Condensing boiler setpoint shall be the lesser of the design condensing boiler supply
temperature, HWSTmax -cond, and current Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint less an
offset of 10°F.

evidence_quote:
a. Non-condensing boiler setpoint shall be the Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint.
b. SPmin in the Plant hot water supply temperature trim and respond loop shall be reset to 155°F
while any non -condensing boilers are in operation.
c. Condensing boiler setpoint shall be the lesser of the design condensing boiler supply
temperature, HWSTmax -cond, and current Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint less an
offset of 10°F.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Reverse-acting P-only loop resets MinCondVlvPos from 0% at 140°F boiler entering temperature to 100% at 135°F. Loop enabled when any non-condensing boiler enabled.

135°F boiler entering temperature.

boiler is enabled. Loop shall be disabled otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Reverse-acting P-only loop resets MaxSecCondSpd from 100% at 140°F boiler entering temp to min pump speed at 135°F. Loop enabled when any secondary pump and any non-condensing boiler enabled.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable loop and override secondary pump speed max with MaxSecCondSpd as described.

minimum pump speed at 135°F boiler entering temperature.

is enabled and any non -condensing boiler is enabled. Loop shall be disabled and MaxSecCondSpd

structured_payload_candidate.title: Condensation Control - Variable Primary Pumps (P-only Loop with Split Output)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-secondary plants with variable speed primary pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Reverse-acting P-only loop maintains boiler entering temp at 140°F. From 0-50% loop output, reset MinPriCondSpd from B-MinPriPumpSpdStage to 100%; from 50-100% output, reset MaxSecCondSpd from 100% to min pump speed. Loop enabled when any non-condensing boiler enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map loop output as described to command primary pump min speed and secondary pump max speed.

140°F. Loop output shall vary from 0% at 140°F boiler entering temperature to 100% at 135°F
boiler entering temperature. Loop output shall be mapped as shown below and described
subsequently.
a. From 0% to 50% loop output, reset an allowable minimum primary pump speed variable,
MinPriCondSpd, from B -MinPriPumpSpdStage to 100%.
b. From 50% to 100% loop output, reset an allowable maximum secondary pump speed variable,
MaxSecCondSpd, from 100% to minim um pump speed.
Condensation control loop shall be enabled whenever any non -condensing boiler is enabled. Loop
shall be disabled, MinPriConSpd set to B -MinPriPumpSpd, and MaxSecCondSpd set to 100%,
otherwise.

boiler entering temperature. Loop output shall be mapped as shown below and described

b. From 50% to 100% loop output, reset an allowable maximum secondary pump speed variable,

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Pump DP Speed Control (Hardwired DP Sensor)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only plants with variable speed primary pumps and DP sensor hardwired to plant controller
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When any pump proven on, control speed with reverse-acting PID loop maintaining DP at HW-DPmax, mapping output from min speed to max speed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reverse-acting PID loop maintains differential pressure at HW-DPmax; all pumps receive same speed signal.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
When any pump is proven on, pump speed shall be controlled by a reverse acting PID loop
maintaining differential pressure at HW -DPmax. All pumps receive  the same speed signal. PID
loop output shall be mapped from minimum pump speed at 0% to maximum pump speed at 100%.

evidence_quote:
When any pump is proven on, pump speed shall be controlled by a reverse acting PID loop
maintaining differential pressure at HW -DPmax. All pumps receive  the same speed signal. PID
loop output shall be mapped from minimum pump speed at 0% to maximum pump speed at 100%.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Pump DP Speed Control - Multiple DP Sensors
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only plants with multiple DP sensors hardwired to plant controller
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Where multiple DP sensors exist, run a PID loop for each sensor. Control pumps to the highest signal output of all DP sensor loops.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run a PID loop for each sensor; use highest output as pump speed control reference.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:

controlled to the high signal output of all DP sen sor loops.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Secondary Pump Staging Based on Speed
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: variable speed secondary pumps serving a loop without a flow meter
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up when speed exceeds 90% for 5 min or 99% for 1 min; stage down when speed falls below 40% for 10 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up or down based on pump speed thresholds.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. Stage up when speed exceeds 90% for 5 minutes or 99% for 1 minutes.
b. Stage down when speed falls below 40% for 10 minutes.

evidence_quote:
a. Stage up when speed exceeds 90% for 5 minutes or 99% for 1 minutes.
b. Stage down when speed falls below 40% for 10 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Flow Bypass Valve Setpoint Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only hot water plants with a minimum flow bypass valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate HW-MinFlowSP as MinFlowRatio times sum of HW-DesFlowX for operating boilers, where MinFlowRatio = max(HW-MinFlowX/HW-DesFlowX) among operating boilers.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate valve to maintain this setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. For th e boilers operating in the stage, identify the boiler with the highest ratio, MinFlowRatio,
of HW -MinFlowX to HW -DesFlowX.
b. Calculate the minimum flow setpoint, HW -MinFlowSP as MinFlowRatio multiplied by the
sum of HW -DesFlowX for the operating boilers.

evidence_quote:
a. For th e boilers operating in the stage, identify the boiler with the highest ratio, MinFlowRatio,
of HW -MinFlowX to HW -DesFlowX.
b. Calculate the minimum flow setpoint, HW -MinFlowSP as MinFlowRatio multiplied by the
sum of HW -DesFlowX for the operating boilers.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Flow Bypass Valve PID (Condensing Boilers)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary loop with only condensing boilers
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Reverse-acting PID loop maintains minimum flow at setpoint; reset valve position from 0% open at 0% loop output to 100% open at 100% output.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: PID loop controls valve position as described.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
A reverse acting PID loop sha ll maintain minimum flow as measured by the hot water flow meter at
setpoint. Reset valve position from 0% open at 0% loop output to 100% open at 100% loop output.

evidence_quote:
A reverse acting PID loop sha ll maintain minimum flow as measured by the hot water flow meter at
setpoint. Reset valve position from 0% open at 0% loop output to 100% open at 100% loop output.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Flow Bypass Valve Startup Bias
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only plants with minimum flow bypass valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When any HW pump proven on, enable bypass valve control loop; initially bias loop to 100% open.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable valve loop and bias PID output to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
When any HW pump is proven on, the bypass valve control loop shall be enabled. The valve shall
be opened otherwise. When enabled, the bypass valve minimum flow PID loop shall be biased
100% (valve 100% open).

evidence_quote:

be opened otherwise. When enabled, the bypass valve minimum flow PID loop shall be biased
100% (valve 100% open).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Boiler Leaving Temperature Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Low boiler leaving HW temp (more than 15°F below setpoint) for more than 15 minutes after boiler enabled > 15 minutes triggers Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Boiler enabled > 15 min AND (HWST setpoint - HWST) > 15°F for > 15 min
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Low boiler leaving hot water temperature (more than 15°F below setpoint) for more than 15 minutes when boiler has been enabled for longer than 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Low boiler leaving hot water temperature (more than 15°F below setpoint ) for more than 15
minutes when boiler has been enabled for longer than 15 minutes:  Level 3

evidence_quote:
Low boiler leaving hot water temperature (more than 15°F below setpoint ) for more than 15
minutes when boiler has been enabled for longer than 15 minutes:  Level 3

structured_payload_candidate.title: Pump Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Alarm if pump status mismatch for 15 s: commanded on/status off = Level 2 (delay 15 s); commanded off/status on = Level 4 (delay 60 s).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Status input different from output command for 15 seconds after respective delays
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate alarm per severity.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Pump alarm is indicated by the status input being different from the output command for 15
seconds.
a. Commanded on, status off:  Level 2. Do not evaluate alarm until  the equipment has been
commanded on for 15 seconds.
b. Commanded off, status on:  Level 4. Do not evaluate alarm until the equipment has been
commanded off for 60 seconds.

evidence_quote:
Pump alarm is indicated by the status input being different from the output command for 15
seconds.
a. Commanded on, status off:  Level 2. Do not evaluate alarm until  the equipment has been
commanded on for 15 seconds.
b. Commanded off, status on:  Level 4. Do not evaluate alarm until the equipment has been
commanded off for 60 seconds.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hot Water Supply Temperature Too Low (AFDD FC#6)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault when HWST AVG + εHWT < HWSTSP in OS #2, #3. Possible causes: mechanical boiler problem, primary flow too high, or boiler sensor calibration deviation.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: HWST AVG + εHWT < HWSTSP continuously for the alarm delay
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault with diagnosis.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
FC#6  Equation  HWST AVG + Ɛ HWT < HWSTSP
Applies
to OS
#2, #3  Description  Hot water supply temperature is too low.
Possible
Diagnosis  Mechanical problem with boilers
Primary flow is higher than the design flow of the operating
boilers
Deviation between the internal boiler hot water supply
temperature sensor and the plant hot water supply
temperature is too high (i.e. boiler sensor is out of
calibration).

FC#6  Equation  HWST AVG + Ɛ HWT < HWSTSP

to OS

structured_payload_candidate.title: Non-Condensing Boiler Return Temperature Too Low (AFDD FC#9)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: hot water plant with non-condensing boiler
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault when HWRT AVG + εHWT < CondTemp (135°F) in OS #2, #3. Condensing likely; possible cause: HWST setpoint too low.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault with diagnosis.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
FC#9  Equation  HWRT AVG +  ƐHWT < CondTemp
Applies
to OS
#2, #3  Description  Hot water return temperature is too low. Condensing is likely
to occur.
Possible
Diagnosis  Hot water supply temperature setpoint is too low.
